title: Earth (droid)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Earth.jpg]] |name=Earth |homeworld=[[Keeper's World]]''[[Do You Know What Your Children Are?]]'' |birth= |death= |creator=[[The Keeper]]{{StoryCite|story=The Keeper's Secret!|book=Pizzazz 8}} |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class=[[Android/Legends|Android]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor=Yellow |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[The Keeper]] }} {{Quote|As for ''me--'' well, I can make the ''earth'' move under your feet--|Earth|}} '''Earth''' was one of the four [[Android/Legends|android]] creations of [[the Keeper]]. He had the ability to manipulate earth. ==Biography== {{Quote|And yet... even a machine can know ''loneliness.'' Thus, the Keeper created four android ''helpers...'' in the image of its ''own'' creators.|The Keeper's vision|}} [[The Keeper]] was left by her [[Keeper's makers|makers]] on the [[Keeper's World]] to restore it after it was devastated in an [[Unidentified war|ancient war]]. To assist with this task, and to fend of her loneliness, the Keeper created four nameless [[Android/Legends|android]] helpers. One of these was an android in [[Gender/Legends|male]] form who could control earth, such as rocks and soil. During the [[Battle of The Keeper's World]] the androids sided with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] against a squad of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]]. While demonstrating his powers, Earth covered R2-D2 with soil, frightening him. Later Earth caused a storm of rocks and boulders to fall from the underground caverns of the [[Keeper's Temple]], distracting the Stormtroopers long enough for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to escape.{{StoryCite|story=Caverns of Mystery!|book=Pizzazz 7}} ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Now you've done it! You've ''frightened'' the little fellow.''"
"Sorry.'' I didn't ''mean'' to.|Unknown android and Earth|}} Earth had the appearance of a [[Human/Legends|human]] male with orange hair. He was not immediately identifiable as a droid, save for his [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], which looked like a yellow light shining from black eye sockets. Earth seemed to be the most impulsive of the Keeper's android creations. Upon first meeting the Rebels, he tersely demanded they identify themselves. Later, while demonstrating his powers, he covered R2-D2 in earth without thought to R2-D2's comfort, disturbing the droid. When this was pointed out to him he promptly apologized, showing that despite his impulsiveness he did mean well. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|--or even ''cover you up,'' if I wanted to. See?|Earth|}} Through some unknown means Earth had complete mastery over his namesake element, controlling both dirt and rocks as he willed. He was able to finely control the earth, covering up R2-D2 in dirt without damaging the droid, as well as wield rocks and earth in combat to devastating effect. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Do You Know What Your Children Are?|book=Pizzazz 6}} {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=Caverns of Mystery!|book=Pizzazz 7}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Keeper's Secret!|book=Pizzazz 8}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Final Fury!|book=Pizzazz 9}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:Keeper's children]]
